rationale: Packaging change: moving BSON C++ code to bson-ext npm module; no spec behavior involved.
Documentation error for GridStore autoclose parameter; no spec conformance issue.
API ergonomics improvement to expose GridStore.currentChunk.chunkNumber as read-only property.
Driver crashes with 'sockets closed' on mixed $elemMatch+exclusion projection; implementation bug, no named spec rule.
User's JS object has duplicate $pullAll keys; JS silently drops duplicates—not a driver spec violation.
Description unclear: 'always requires a callback' appears to be API usability complaint, not a write concern spec violation.
GridFS I/O error in child process; OS-level EIO error, implementation bug, no spec rule contradicted.
maxPoolSize being ignored; pool implementation bug, pre-CMAP era, no specific spec rule named.
Performance issue: cursor calls blocking for a long time against 3.0.1; not a spec behavior violation.
Error event not triggered on pipe error; Node.js stream implementation bug, no spec rule involved.
CI test failure on Debian Wheezy due to missing package.json; build/environment issue.
Auth error object lacks message when thrown; error formatting implementation bug, not a spec violation.
Build environment setup for Windows BSON binaries; pure build infrastructure.
Missing protocol in URI causes hang; error handling bug in connection string parsing, no spec rule named.
Unencoded '%' in password crashes URI parser; connection string parsing edge case, no specific spec rule cited.
GridStoreStream.write always returns false causing pipe stall; Node.js stream implementation bug.
GridStoreStream._read ignores error from GridStore.read; error handling bug, not a spec violation.
GridStore constructor fails when optional id parameter omitted; API implementation bug.
'@' in password crashes driver because url_parser uses first '@' as delimiter; connection string parsing bug.
raw:true re-insert broken in 2.0; driver-specific raw mode regression, not a cross-driver spec behavior.
Build failure on io.js 2.0.0 on Heroku; packaging/build issue only.
Event listener leak when calling db.db() repeatedly; internal implementation bug, not a spec violation.
Auth fails with Node 0.8.28 due to pure-JS BSON fallback and version compatibility; not a spec rule violation.
Auth fails when same options object reused in db.authenticate(); options mutation bug, not a spec violation.
GridFS read() incorrectly errors 'no chunks found' when file size exactly aligns with chunk size; edge-case implementation bug.
GridFS read() incorrectly errors 'no chunks found' when file size exactly aligns with chunk size; edge-case implementation bug.
db.close() callback fires synchronously instead of on next event loop turn; async contract bug, not a spec issue.
Improvement to limit arbiters to single monitoring connection; optimization, not a spec violation.
Reconnect counter permanently decremented after successful reconnect; internal state management bug, not a spec rule.
insert callback not called on first insert to non-existent database; edge-case callback bug, not a spec violation.
Null reference crash in insertOne callback when w:0; implementation bug in result handling, not write-concern spec deviation.
findAndModify and dropIndex (writes) routed to secondary instead of primary; server selection spec requires writes go to primary.
SCRAM-SHA-1 auth fails with multiple mongos seed list; topology/auth coordination implementation bug, no specific SCRAM rule cited.
Cursor.next behaves differently from deprecated nextObject for tailable cursors; API change behavior, not a spec rule violation.
Server-side WiredTiger memory leak; links SERVER-17386/SERVER-17334 confirm server bug, not driver issue.
cursor.limit(30016).skip(30016) returns 31000 docs; limit value not respected, violates CRUD spec constraint on returned document count.
Cursor.prototype.each passes undefined callback to _each; implementation code bug, not a spec violation.
Null reference in ServerCapabilities when lastIsMaster() returns null at startup; race condition implementation bug.
Deprecation warnings building bson C++ extension against io.js; build/packaging issue only.
Internal refactor of BSON parser API for cleaner setup; no spec behavior change.
Build error in kerberos module during npm install; build/packaging issue only.
Updating deprecated Buffer.write() argument order to Node.js new API; internal API deprecation fix.
User question about multiple sequential updates; no driver bug confirmed, support question resolved as Done.
maxPoolSize causes all connections established immediately at connect; pool implementation behavior, pre-CMAP spec era.
Documentation example references nonexistent useLegacyOps option; doc error only.
findOneAndDelete/Replace/Update options undefined when using promiseLibrary; API implementation bug.
Duplicate hosts in seed list causes excess connections; connection deduplication implementation bug.
Driver hangs after primary crash; failover recovery implementation bug, no specific SDAM rule cited.
cursor.toArray() fails for docs with 'result' array property; property name collision in cursor result handling, implementation bug.
bulkWrite freezes or throws when used as a promise; promise API implementation bug, not a spec violation.
